descriptionByLocale.en:
##STR1##

As part of this extension in the field of stationary pain therapy, we are looking for a medical co-direction or a leading/n & doctor/ doctor/ physician as per autumn 2026 or by agreement. Together with you, we want to further develop the future of integrative medicine and build up stationary pain therapy.

# Mansioni

- & Medical guidance and strategic development of Clinica Curativa in the field of integrative stationary pain therapy
- Clinical activity in our own field with responsibility for holistic patient care
- Interdisciplinary cooperation with medical, psychological, therapeutic and nursing teams
- Promoting training, training and training
- Designing innovative projects

##

- Specialist/specialist with experience in the field of stationary pain therapy ideally with emphasis on interventional pain therapy SSIPM and/or skill ID SPS Pain specialist/in and/or skill ID SAPPM or equivalent additional training
- FachГ¤rztin/Facharzt General Internal Medicine with Ability ID in complementary medical methods
- Multiannual leadership experience or willingness to take over leadership responsibility
- Engagement in evidence-based complementarity medicine and interest in multimodal, interdisciplinary treatment of chronic pain patients
- Enthusiasm for an integrative, patient-centered treatment concept
- Digital competence in handling an integrated KIS
- High-communication, team-oriented personality with innovative strength and design will

## Cosa offriamo

- Responsive function (cadder) with large design space
- Clearly structured working hours, high quality of life in a holiday region with versatile recreation and sports facilities
- Integration into a dedicated, multi-professional team in an inspiring environment in the Engadin
- Excellent cooperation with the Ospidal and the other part of the Health Centre
- Interdisciplinary working environment with short decision paths
- Attractive employment conditions and support in continuing and continuing training
- Possibility to develop integrative concepts in pain medicine

# Contatto

Under the umbrella В«Center da sandГ  Engiadina BassaВ» (CSEB) / В«Health Center UnterengadinВ» important regional providers in the areas of health care and wellness go a common path. The offers of the regional hospital, the rescue service, the rehabilitation clinic, the Spitex, the care groups, the nursing homes and the Bogn Engiadina mineral bath are optimally matched. With this integrated supply model, CSEB has pioneered work in the region and beyond its borders. The Clinica Curativa combines medical excellence with complementary medical skills. Our integrative clinic stands for patient-centric and holistic treatment in the fields of complementary medicine, psychosomatics and oncology. It is in the construction of an innovative and integrative pain center that provides patients with acute and chronic pain in an interdisciplinary and multimodal setting.

For information please contact Dr. med. Cem Yetimoglu or the director of the health center Dr. med. Joachim Koppenberg likes to be available. You can reach us at +41 81 861 13 00. We look forward to your online application.

descriptionByLocale.en: For the operating department at Ospidal Scuol, we are looking for a motivated individual starting from June 1, 2026, or by mutual agreement. ## Main duties - Our key areas of focus include traumatology, orthopedics with endoprosthetics, gynecology, and visceral surgery. - We also offer gastroenterology, pneumology with corresponding endoscopic examinations, and pain therapy interventions. - Key responsibilities: - Instrumenting and assisting during surgeries - Ensuring nursing care and support for patients during their stay in the operating department - Instrument preparation and sterilization in the AEMP - Assisting with medical endoscopies ## Requirements - Certified nursing diploma or technical surgical staff diploma, or equivalent experience as an operating room specialist - Responsible and independent work ethic - Proficiency in German (written and spoken) and familiarity with common IT applications - Teamwork skills, initiative, and flexibility - Openness to new ideas and commitment to change - Willingness to work on-call and weekends - Completed training as a technical sterilization assistant is an advantage ## What we offer - Exciting and varied work - Modern infrastructure - Competitive employment conditions - Comprehensive professional training - Internal and external further education opportunities ## Contact Under the umbrella of В«Center da sanadad Engiadina BassaВ» (CSEB) / В«Health Center Lower EngadineВ», important regional providers in healthcare and wellness are joining forces. In the National Park region, you will find a wonderful environment with diverse recreational and sports opportunities. Ospidal Lower Engadine is a regional hospital responsible for basic and emergency medical care in the region. The hospital provides services in surgery, traumatology, orthopedics, gynecology and obstetrics, internal medicine and palliative care, integrative medicine, anesthesiology and pain therapy, including an IMC unit. The hospital features state-of-the-art infrastructure with KIS, RIS, PACS, including numerous advanced telemedicine solutions, as well as a modern operating theater with 2 ORs. For further information, please contact Karsten Gulke, Head of OR Nursing, at +41 81 861 12 49. We look forward to receiving your online application.
